channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Windows 11 va enfin vous laisser couper Bing de la recherche
item.description: Microsoft va enfin permettre de couper les résultats Bing dans la recherche de Windows 11. De quoi gagner en rapidité et en tranquillité, sans bidouiller le registre.

item.title: Apple tipped to launch 6 new iPhones, 2 new wearables, and more in 'biggest product year’ ever — here's the full list
item.description: With the iPhone 20 Pro, iPhone Ultra 2, Apple glasses and more all potentially launching in 2027, it could be a huge year for Apple devices.

item.title: Epic Games promet un launcher 5 fois plus rapide, mais ses chiffres posent question
item.description: Epic Games promet un launcher reconstruit de fond en comble, jusqu’à 5 fois plus rapide au démarrage et avec un tout nouveau design pour les pages de jeu.

item.title: Amazon is investigating three employees who spoke out against building more AI data centers
item.description: The engineers who spoke negatively about AI data centers at Seattle city hearings accuse Amazon of threatening their jobs over their testimonies.

item.title: PlayStation l’assume : ses gros jeux solo resteront sur PS5, pas sur PC
item.description: Sony assume enfin son virage : ses gros jeux solo PlayStation resteront sur PS5, sans portage PC. Une rupture nette après six ans d'ouverture vers Steam.

item.title: Suspension de Claude Fable 5 et Mythos 5 : une semaine plus tard, où en sont les négociations entre Anthropic et Donald Trump ?
item.description: Le Royaume-Uni et plusieurs membres du G7 ont demandé aux États-Unis d'amender l'interdiction des nouvelles IA d'Anthropic. Tandis que Washington a rejeté l’idée d’une exception pour ses alliés, des négociations plus directes s’ouvrent en coulisses avec le patron d’Anthropic, Dario Amodei.

item.title: The Best iPad to Buy (and Some to Avoid) in 2026: Compare the Air, Pro, Mini
item.description: We break down the current iPad lineup to help you figure out which of Apple’s tablets is best for you.

item.title: In season 2 of Sugar, Colin Farrell’s quirky detective becomes much more human
item.description: When Colin Farrell was doing press for the first season of the detective series Sugar, he had to be very careful with how he spoke. Sugar is a story about a quirky private detective, but it's also secretly a work of science fiction, something that doesn't become clear until halfway through the season. "I knew […]

item.title: Kaleidescape’s movie player blows streaming, and your wallet, away
item.description: We've lost something in the past 15 years. Netflix, Amazon, Disney, Apple; they've all convinced us that streaming is the best way to watch movies and shows at home. With everything at our fingertips, there's no need to run to Blockbuster for the weekend's entertainment, or wait for a DVD rental to arrive in the […]

item.title: 11 powerful fans from £40 to £100 to keep you cool during the upcoming heatwave, from big brands like Dyson and Meaco
item.description: There's another heatwave on the way, so pick up one of these budge-friendly fans to keep yourself comfortable.

item.title: SSD expert shares some worrying truths about Chinese chip makers — and I think this could be more bad news for the RAM crisis
item.description: Here's another sign the RAM crisis is here to stay, as boss in SSD supply chain shares some home truths about Chinese chip makers.

item.title: Apple price hikes predicted to be ‘fairly imminent’ — so don't wait on upgrading your Mac, iPad or iPhone
item.description: Apple is planning price hikes and they could be ‘imminent,’ one analyst believes.

item.title: Votre TV cache sa meilleure prise HDMI et la bride volontairement : comment l’activer
item.description: Vous avez acheté un beau téléviseur 4K compatible 120 Hz, branché votre PS5, et l'image plafonne quand même ? Le coupable est souvent un réglage caché, désactivé d'usine sur la plupart des téléviseurs.

item.title: From flying chairs to a flood of tempura prawns, the Honor 600 Pro has some absolutely crazy AI video features — but there’s a catch
item.description: The Honor 600 Pro boasts some impressive video generation tools.

item.title: Best Mesh Wi-Fi Systems (2026): Netgear, Asus, Amazon, and More
item.description: Forget about patchy internet connections and dead spots in the house. These WIRED-tested multiroom mesh systems will get you online in no time.

item.title: Écosse-Maroc : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne voir ce choc du Groupe C
item.description: Cette nuit, Écosse et Maroc s'affrontent dans le Groupe C de la Coupe du monde 2026, un duel à ne pas manquer entre deux équipes qui se battent pour leur place dans la compétition. Voici à quelle heure, sur quelle chaîne et comment regarder le match en streaming, gratuitement ou avec un abonnement.

item.title: 15 must-read business books by black authors that will help you thrive professionally
item.description: Invaluable advice for whatever career stage you’re in. If you’re serious about your career, then chances are you’re constantly on the hunt for resources to help you prosper at work. The most successful leaders are readers, and it’s a no-brainer that books offer the most useful guides on how to reach your professional goals.

item.title: Canon is tipped to unveil multiple world-first lenses this year — these are the rumored RF lenses to look out for, and your chance to vote for your favorite
item.description: Canon is being tipped to release several pro primes and zoom lenses in 2026. These are the lenses to look out for, and how to have your say on which ones excite you the most.

item.title: AI traffic to travel sites is booming as shoppers look for the best holiday deal without doing any research
item.description: Planning itineraries, finding more personalized recommendations and uncovering discounts – those are what consumers are using AI for in travel.

item.title: Fujifilm X-M5 : cet appareil photo hybride pensé pour les vlogueurs et livré avec son zoom ne dépasse pas les 900 €
item.description: Appareil photo hybride compact, minimaliste et très léger, le Fujifilm X-M5 a été pensé pour les créateurs de contenu habitués au smartphone, mais en quête d'une meilleure qualité d'image. Actuellement, Amazon le propose, avec son zoom, à 899 euros au lieu de 999 euros.

item.title: New Google Health 5.02 update gets praise from Fitbit fans for being ‘solid work’, but some still say that ‘nobody wants' the AI coach
item.description: Google Health 5.02 is appearing on devices now, and looks to be getting frustrated users back on side.

item.title: C’est « le goulag » chez Meta : la course à l’IA tourne au cauchemar pour les employés de Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: « C'est littéralement le goulag. Du jour au lendemain, vous n'avez plus aucun but dans la vie ». Certains employés de Meta décrivent un climat de travail délétère au sein de l’entreprise. La course au développement de l’intelligence artificielle menée par le groupe se ferait au détriment de la santé mentale de ses salariés.

item.title: Claude is becoming more agentic. Amanda Askell is thinking through what that means
item.description: The Anthropic researcher is focused on one of AI’s hardest problems: how to make models that are helpful, safe, and responsive to human values as they begin to act on our behalf. Amanda Askell spends her days thinking about how to ensure Claude, Anthropic’s AI chatbot, operates with a sense of morality.

item.title: Shadow AI – a step too far, or an opportunity?
item.description: Businesses are facing a new challenge - shadow AI. Teams are unleashing the potential of AI, but IT isn’t always aware and that’s creating a real risk related to ‘shadow AI’.

item.title: The Best Art TVs
item.description: Even after your movies end, these art televisions look stunning on any wall.

item.title: Gen Z Singles Are Trying to Make ‘Solomaxxing’ Aspirational
item.description: For young people, the trend removes the stigma of being unmarried and alone, and recasts it as something to aim for, not avoid.

item.title: How to take a vacation as a solopreneur
item.description: One recent survey found one-third of solo business owners never take time off. Here’s how to change that. When I worked a corporate job, I had unlimited PTO. And I easily took 6+ weeks of time off every year. I have kids and followed their school schedule, taking time off for spring break and Christmas (for example).

item.title: Flat PopSockets are here. Will men want it now?
item.description: PopSockets founder David Barnett discusses the new Low-Pro Grip, a flatter take on the popular phone accessory designed to reduce bulk.

item.title: This Kindle Paperwhite bundle has hit its lowest-ever price at Amazon — save $69
item.description: As of June 19, the Kindle Paperwhite Bundle has dropped to its lowest-ever price at Amazon of $147.97 exclusively for Prime members. This is $69 off its full bundle price of $216.97.

item.title: AI exposes the M&A integration gaps that governance must fix
item.description: Nine in ten companies now use AI, but M&A keeps revealing what’s broken underneath.

item.title: Android 17 supprime vos widgets sur Pixel ? Voici comment les récupérer
item.description: Un bug supprime les widgets de l’écran d’accueil de certains Pixel de Google passés sous Android 17. Le constructeur développe un correctif, mais une manipulation manuelle permet déjà de résoudre le problème.

item.title: At least one UK government department is reportedly done with X
item.description: UK attorney general Richard Hermer told his staff his office was quitting X, according to The Guardian and The Observer.

item.title: Scuba V3, Scuba S1, IrriSense 2 : les meilleures promos Aiper avant les Prime Day [Sponso]
item.description: Prendre soin de sa piscine est primordial... Mais chronophage. Pour échapper à cette tâche fastidieuse, les robots intelligents Aiper sont tout indiqués et sont en prime à prix cassé avant les Prime Day d’Amazon.

item.title: Try One of macOS 27’s Best Features Right Now
item.description: Apple’s fall macOS release will let you build Shortcuts by typing what you want to happen. But Claude Code and Codex users don’t have to wait.

item.title: Pump.Fun’s Bounties Platform Is a Black Hole of Circular Grifting
item.description: The crypto platform claims you can “pay anyone to do anything,” from quitting a job on camera to getting a memecoin-themed tattoo. But it mostly seems like people trying to scam each other.

item.title: Prix cassé sur ce pack Samsung : une tablette et un bracelet connecté pour moins de 160 €
item.description: Si vous cherchez à vous équiper avec du matériel Samsung sans vous ruiner, voici un pack très intéressant. Il réunit la tablette d'entrée de gamme Samsung Galaxy Tab A11 et le bracelet connecté orienté sport Galaxy Fit 3 pour seulement 158,10 euros au lieu de 229,90 euros.

item.title: The RAM crisis just killed Nothing’s next budget phone — CMF Phone 3 Pro scrapped as co-founder says ‘we can't build a phone that feels like a genuine step forward’
item.description: AI has a lot to answer for, with the ongoing RAM crisis now leading to no new CMF phones this year.

item.title: Une fusée chinoise explose en orbite : les satellites Starlink de SpaceX sous surveillance
item.description: L'étage supérieur de la fusée commerciale chinoise Zhuque-2E s'est désintégré en orbite basse après sa mission. Un incident qui a généré plus d'une centaine de débris, menaçant directement une partie de la constellation Starlink.

item.title: Boses famously comfortable QuietComfort Ultra headphones are $70 off ahead of Prime Day
item.description: The Bose QuietComfort Ultra (2nd Gen) headphones are down to a discounted price of $379 at Amazon, saving you $70 off the usual $449 price.

item.title: The Vimeo breach and the dangers of delegated trust
item.description: One compromised analytics vendor gave hackers a passport to dozens of major customer environments.

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for June 19, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the June 19, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.

item.title: Are stores open on Juneteenth? Holiday hours for Walmart, Costco, stock markets, banks, and more
item.description: The newest addition to the federal holiday calendar is Friday, June 19, marking the end of slavery in the United States. Some services won’t be operational. Juneteenth—the newest federal holiday that commemorates the end of slavery in the United States—may remain unfamiliar to some. People across America and around the world are still learning about this important observance, which we celebrate today, Friday, June 19....
